# Linear Regression Modelling with R {#regression-with-r}

```{r regression-with-r-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/regression-with-r-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/regression-with-r/"
)
```

```{r child-regression-with-r, child="../lecture-content/04-regression-with-r.Rmd"}
```
